title: EMPLOYMENT AND INDEPENDENT LIVING SERVICES - 211info
text: BRIDGES OREGON EMPLOYMENT AND INDEPENDENT LIVING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to finding jobs and navigating state and local resources and systems, including Vocational Rehabilitation (VR), and the Office of Developmental Disability Services (ODDS). 475 Cottage Street NE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Deaf, DeafBlind, and Hard of Hearing individuals Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 751-2346 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 751-2346 Director of Employment and Independent Living Services Christopher Mortensen Alternate (971) 446-1829 Text, FaceTime, or Duo Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to start intake process or for more information. To access the MARVEL department, open a file through the local VR office and let VR counselor know intent to work with the MARVEL department to find a job. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Oregon driver's license or ID card, health insurance LANGUAGES: American Sign Language, interpretation by arrangement Website: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Related Center Based Employment Independent Living Skills Instruction Job Finding Assistance Prejob Guidance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNICATION FACILITATOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ADVOCACY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIDGES OREGON
